title: Define concept
instruction: Establish the core premise, subject, and transformation clearly enough that the project has a specific creative identity and can move into story development.

title: Shape story
instruction: Turn the concept into a coherent narrative or ad arc with clear progression, emotional logic, and enough structure to guide shot planning.

title: Define characters
instruction: Establish stable visual and behavioral anchors for recurring subjects so they can stay consistent across story, storyboard, and prompts.

title: Prepare character sheets
instruction: Write one sidecar JSON file per character so character-sheet generation produces a clean single-subject reference image for downstream Veo consistency, with stable prompts, IDs, and model metadata.

title: Review character sheets
instruction: Generate and review one canonical PNG per character as a clean single-subject reference image for downstream video, not a grid, collage, or stylized hero shot.

title: Build storyboard
instruction: Create a shot-by-shot plan with stable shot IDs and clear visual intent so the sequence can guide keyframes and prompts.

title: Review storyboard
instruction: Generate and review one full-project storyboard board from STORYBOARD.md before committing to keyframes.

title: Plan keyframes
instruction: Plan distinct keyframes for each storyboard shot, defaulting to one start and one end frame per shot unless a deliberate single-frame exception is justified.

title: Prepare keyframes
instruction: Write one sidecar JSON file per keyframe so still-image generation has stable prompts, IDs, and model metadata.

title: Review keyframes
instruction: Generate and review one canonical PNG per planned keyframe before treating the shot anchors as locked.

title: Plan shots
instruction: Write one planning entry per shot so each storyboard beat has canonical keyframe anchors and a canonical output video path.

title: Prepare shots
instruction: Write one sidecar JSON file per shot so video generation has stable prompts, IDs, and model metadata.

title: Review shots
instruction: Generate and review one canonical MP4 per planned shot before treating the motion sequence as locked.
